release_notes:
- Fix: license activation now tolerates clock skew between issuer and activator (resolved Carlo/Seoul UTC+9 failure). validate_license_key() searches ±2 years of base dates.
- Fix: 'Recover Autosave' dialog no longer fires on every launch. Autosave files are now deleted after a successful save or clean close.
- New: change log captures finer-grained edits. Interval creation/edits/deletions, USCS classifications, generated lab data, and per-test data (triaxial/consolidation/compaction/CBR) are now recorded in the .prj change_log with full licensee attribution.
